command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 "echo === REMY OpenClaw .199 === && ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 jose@192.168.0.199 "systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway && journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway -n 20 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -15" && echo === SAKURA Hermes .202 === && ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 jose@192.168.0.202 "systemctl is-active hermes-gateway && tail -30 /tmp/hermes.log""
